description.ko: 소리 파동이 보이지 않는 주파수에 반응하여 유동적이고 빛나는 빛의 리본으로 변하는 매혹적인 디지털 캔버스입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing digital canvas where sound waves transform into fluid, glowing ribbons of light, reacting to invisible frequencies.

prompt: Cinematic 3D sound visualization, abstract fluid waveforms pulsating with neon colors, cymatics patterns, glowing particles floating in a dark void, high-speed shutter, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, rhythmic motion blur, bioluminescent gradients.
